jsonLd.title: Mid-Level SEO Specialist at Melorra
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Melorra in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Melorra:
Melorra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Melorra!
